audit_scope: Full year single-transaction exceedance scan across all expense types with per-transaction/per-occurrence standards

expense_types_in_scope.rule: 差旅住宿费按职级和城市档位控制，每人每晚不超过对应标准
expense_types_in_scope.single_transaction_check: single lodging record amount > per-night cap by employee level and city tier

expense_types_in_scope.rule: 市内交通包干标准：一类城市每日120元，二类城市每日100元，三类城市每日80元
expense_types_in_scope.single_transaction_check: single transport record amount > daily cap by city tier

expense_types_in_scope.rule: 培训课程费按人次控制，每人每期不超过3500元
业务招待单次活动费用不得超过5000元；按参与人数核算人均不得超过300元
expense_types_in_scope.single_transaction_check: single entertainment record > 5000; per_person needs participant count from reason

expense_types_in_scope.rule: 员工个人办公用品报销按月控制，每人每月不超过600元
expense_types_in_scope.single_transaction_check: single office_supplies record amount > 600 (not evaluating cumulative monthly overages per task instruction)

expense_types_in_scope.rule: 员工通讯费用报销按月控制，每人每月不超过300元
expense_types_in_scope.single_transaction_check: single communication record amount > 300 (not evaluating cumulative monthly overages per task instruction)

policy_documents.role: travel lodging and local transport standards

execution_steps: 2. Policy version check: confirm 2025 policies apply to full year, no version ambiguity
3. Launch data analyst subagent to scan all 4240 records against single-transaction thresholds
4. Main agent: verify policy clauses and city-tier extraction logic
5. Consolidate findings and record anomaly IDs
complexity_reasons: Two or more policies: travel, training, entertainment, office/comm policies
Aggregation, joins, batch filtering: join 4240 records with employee data, scan against multiple thresholds
Two or more business rules: 6 distinct expense type rules
Thresholds, dates, exemptions: thresholds vary by employee level and city tier

data_analyst.task: Scan all 4240 expense records against single-transaction thresholds for all 6 expense types. Join with employee data for level-based thresholds. Extract city tier from reason text for travel/transport records. Identify all records exceeding single-transaction caps.

stopping_conditions: All 4240 records scanned against applicable single-transaction thresholds
All anomaly findings have stable IDs, complete record_id sets, and policy citations
unresolved_items: City tier mapping from reason text needs careful rule-based extraction
Business entertainment per-person check may not be feasible without participant count in data
Training comprehensive daily fee (internal 800/external 1200) may need separate expense type check if data exists
